items.description: Multi vehicle crash on I-76 eastbound between 1.1 miles east of Exit 346B: GREYS FERRY AVE/UNIVERSITY AVE and 1 miles west of Exit 347A/347B: 347A TO PA 291 AND I-95 SOUTH / PENROSE AVE / INTL AIRPORT - 347B PASSYUNK AND OREGON AVE. There is a lane restriction.
